name: Stuffed Jalapenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil for deep-frying.
2. Slit the sides of the peppers and scrape out the seeds.
3. Stuff the peppers with triangular pieces of cheddar cheese cut to fit each pepper.
4. Dip the peppers first in an egg wash, then into a mixture of half cornmeal and half flour.
5. Allow the stuffed peppers to dry for about 15 minutes.
6. Deep fry in hot fat until the peppers are lightly browned and the cheese is just melting.
7. Drain on absorbent paper and serve.
You can also use crabmeat or shrimp salad stuffing for these.
